name: OAuth Per-Client RLS Scoping
description: Adds per-client row-level security to the thoughts table for an OAuth 2.1 resource server. Scopes all reads and writes by the JWT client_id claim, grants the authenticated role the necessary table and function privileges, and redefines upsert_thought / match_thoughts as SECURITY INVOKER so per-request Supabase clients only ever see their own client's memory.
